behaviors.description: Stage 1 feature extraction: f_wiring=yes (evidence: "parse successfully and proceed through normal hook input handling" implies parser -> downstream hook-input handoff); f_real_infra=no (no real process/OS requirement stated); f_model_judgment=no (pure JSON parse/flow correctness); f_multi_agentic_steps=no (no multi-step model loop). Stage 2 mapping: Integration.
behaviors.justification: Risk is in cross-module handoff after successful parse, not model quality or real infrastructure.
behaviors.test_description: Feed valid JSON containing markdown-heavy strings (code fences, backticks, $vars) into the parser/input boundary and assert successful parse plus normal downstream handling path.

behaviors.description: Stage 1 feature extraction: f_wiring=yes (evidence: "produce a `json_parse_failed` trace record" requires parser error -> tracing handoff); f_real_infra=no (can be exercised without real process); f_model_judgment=no (deterministic malformed JSON handling); f_multi_agentic_steps=no. Stage 2 mapping: Integration.
behaviors.justification: Failure is about correct propagation of parse error context into trace records across components.
behaviors.test_description: Provide malformed JSON and assert `json_parse_failed` trace is emitted with contextual fields identifying malformed section.

behaviors.description: Stage 1 feature extraction: f_wiring=yes (evidence: "error-policy path maps parse failure to a handled result ... and marks telemetry intent" implies parse error -> policy -> telemetry mapping); f_real_infra=no; f_model_judgment=no; f_multi_agentic_steps=no. Stage 2 mapping: Integration.
behaviors.justification: Main risk is mapping consistency between error policy outcome and telemetry intent across boundaries.
behaviors.test_description: Trigger parse failure via malformed payload and assert no throw, handled result returned, and telemetry-intent marker set.

behaviors.description: Stage 1 feature extraction: f_wiring=yes (parser -> trace path still relevant); f_real_infra=yes (evidence: "In real process execution" and "malformed stdin" and process lifecycle/exit); f_model_judgment=no; f_multi_agentic_steps=no. Stage 2 mapping (precedence): System.
behaviors.justification: Requires real stdin/process behavior and crash-resilience validation that mocks can miss.
behaviors.test_description: Spawn real hook process, send malformed stdin, assert non-crash behavior and expected trace signal emitted before exit.

behaviors.description: Stage 1 feature extraction: f_wiring=yes (evidence: explicit "stdin -> parser -> trace sink" pipeline); f_real_infra=yes ("real hook invocation path" and real artifact emission); f_model_judgment=no; f_multi_agentic_steps=no. Stage 2 mapping (precedence): System.
behaviors.justification: End-to-end hook invocation with real stdin and trace artifact generation is infrastructure-coupled.
behaviors.test_description: Run real hook invocation with malformed input through stdin and verify trace artifact at the configured sink contains expected parse-failure signal.

behaviors.description: Stage 1 feature extraction: f_wiring=yes (evidence: "distinguish malformed-JSON failures from valid-markdown payloads" requires attribution logic across parse + classification/reporting); f_real_infra=no (can run in controlled test harness); f_model_judgment=no (deterministic distinction); f_multi_agentic_steps=no. Stage 2 mapping: Integration.
behaviors.justification: Regression risk is incorrect attribution between two input classes across parser/error-report interfaces.
behaviors.test_description: Add paired regression cases: valid markdown-heavy JSON vs malformed JSON; assert only malformed case triggers parse-failure attribution and valid case follows success path.
